title: Diary of a Nymphomaniac
posterAlt: Diary of a Nymphomaniac (2008) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A chronicle of the life of a middle-class French girl's sexual adventures, her then fall into prostitution, and her ultimate redemption.
synopsis: Diary of a Nymphomaniac (2008) is a drama and romance film from Spain. It has a 5.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
